## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services for PropForMatch's SEO needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses AI workflows to produce high-quality, high-volume content (3000 articles/month) with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Their process includes extensive keyword research, content strategy, and 250-step content creation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [GrowthX offers two packages: 25 editorial pieces ($9k/mo) or 100 programmatic pages ($12k/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [PropForMatch is launching a new website soon, which GrowthX can assist with technical SEO aspects](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Creation

  - [Uses AI workflows with human oversight for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Produces 3000 articles/month with a team of 25-30 people](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [250-step process from keyword research to final output](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Includes content strategy, article generation, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Clients include Reddit, Ramp, and other fast-growing companies](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Extensive keyword research (e.g., 2800 topics for Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Segmentation into content buckets (e.g., product comparisons, trading strategies)](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Tailored to client's ICP and brand positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Includes title generation, article creation, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

### SEO Performance and Results

  - [Faster results compared to traditional SEO approaches](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Example: Firework saw 10x increase in impressions after content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Utilizes tools like Sistrix to measure performance of individual articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Service Offerings

  - [Two main packages:](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
    1.  $9k/mo: 25 editorial content pieces/month
    2.  $12k/mo: 100 programmatic pages/month
  - [Includes content repurposing, technical SEO, and website migration support](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Integrated team communication via Slack and regular progress meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

### PropForMatch's Specific Needs

  - [Currently have an SEO specialist but seeking better results](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Launching a new website soon, requiring technical SEO assistance](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Custom image creation for content may be needed](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send follow-up email with SOW (Statement of Work) and meeting recording](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Gabbie to discuss the proposal with her manager and compare with other agencies](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call with PropForMatch team to clarify value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide support for PropForMatch's upcoming website launch if partnership moves forward](https://fathom.video/share/Ewr2X6BqgLR4ty3AYsbx32tQWzPwxD8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
